name: Flooded Waste
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed – bow each attacking character.

name: Seeking the Truth
text:
This province gets +2 strength while you have a Water role.
Interrupt: When this province is broken, choose a defending character – move that character home.

name: Ikebana Artisan
text: Interrupt: When you would lose 1 honor for an unopposed conflict – cancel that honor loss. Then, lose 1 fate. (Unlimited.)

name: Volcanic Troll
text:
No attachments except Weapon.
While the [fire] ring is unclaimed, this character gets +2[mil] and +2[pol].

name: Tireless Sōdan Senzo
text: This character does not bow as a result of conflict resolution in conflicts in which it lost.

name: Asako Azunami
text: Interrupt: When you would resolve the [water] ring – instead of the normal ring effect, you may choose and bow any character and you may choose and ready a different character.

name: Disguised Protector
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating – each player adds the bid on his or her honor dial to his or her skill total during this conflict's resolution.

name: Hidden Moon Dōjō
text:
Limit 1 per deck.
You may play characters in adjacent provinces as if they were in your hand.
Action: During a conflict – turn a card in an adjacent province faceup.

name: Master of the Swift Waves
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character you control and a character in your home – switch the chosen characters' locations.

name: Yoritomo
text: This character gets +X[mil] and +X[pol]. X is equal to the number of fate in your fate pool.

name: Nezumi Infiltrator
text:
Immune to Shadowlands and Mahō card effects.
Reaction: After this character enters play during a conflict – until the end of the conflict, raise or lower the strength of the attacked province by 1 (to a minimum of 1). (Max 1 per conflict.)

name: Fight On
text:
Water role only.
Action: While you are the defending player, choose a bowed character you control – ready that character and move it to the conflict.

name: Menacing Iron Warrior
text: Action: While this character is participating in a [mil] conflict – until the end of the conflict, each participating character your opponent controls with equal or lower [mil] skill than this character cannot trigger abilities.

name: Soul Beyond Reproach
text:
Air role only.
Action: Choose a character you control – honor that character. Then, honor it again.

name: Hawk Tattoo
text:
Attach to a character you control.
Attached character gains Tattooed.
Reaction: After you play this attachment during a conflict – move attached character to the conflict. If attached character is a Monk, you may take another action after this one.

name: Heroic Resolve
text: Action: If you have 2 or more rings in your claimed ring pool – ready attached character.

name: My Ancestor's Strength
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Shugenja character you control and a character in your dynasty discard pile – until the end of the conflict, set the participating character's base [mil] and [pol] skill equal to the printed [mil] and [pol] skill of the other character.

name: Ofushikai
text:
Ancestral. Restricted. Attach to a unique  character you control.
If attached character has the Champion trait, it gains: "Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character – move that character home. It cannot participate as an attacker this phase."

name: Deceptive Offer
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character you control. Your opponent selects one – that character gets +2[mil] and +2[pol] until the end of the conflict, or your opponent gives you 1 honor.

name: Force of the River
text:
Attach to a Shugenja character you control.
Action: During a conflict – put each facedown card in your provinces into play facedown in the conflict as a 1[mil], –[pol], 0 glory character with the Cavalry and Spirit traits. Discard those characters at the end of the conflict.
